display.name: Hunt Marked Brigand
display.short_description: A weathered board at the edge of the hamlet names one brigand who has been bleeding the nearby road dry.

rules.briefing_text: A marked brigand is working the stage pockets. Run the thief down, end the threat, and the hamlet will open its stores.
rules.accepted_text: The brigand is marked on the map now. Finish the hunt, then return to the hamlet for aid.
rules.completed_text: The marked brigand is down. Choose one hamlet reward before you move on.
rules.claimed_text: The brigand's board entry is already crossed out. This request is settled.
